name: Christmas Morning Cranberry Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Coarsely chop cranberries and sprinkle with 1/4 cup sugar. Set aside.
2. Preheat oven to 375°F and prepare pans.
3. In a bowl, combine flour, 2nd measure of sugar, baking powder, salt, cinnamon, and allspice.
4. In another bowl, beat egg, add orange rind and juice, and mix melted butter.
5. Add the dry mixture to the wet mixture and stir until moistened.
6. Fold in the cranberry mixture and chopped nuts.
7. Spoon batter into prepared pans.
8. Bake for 15-20 minutes or until golden brown.
9. Makes 9 large muffins.
